Re Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories , Special Interrogatories, And Responses And Documents To Demand For Inspection
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendants Marilyn Lui, Lisa Lui's Motion For Order Compelling Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Responses And Documents To Demand For Inspection is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $415, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
